output.sparql:
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?discipline ?disciplineLabel WHERE {
  wd:Q9680 wdt:P527 ?event .
  ?event wdt:P641 ?discipline .
  ?discipline rdfs:label ?disciplineLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?disciplineLabel) = 'en')
  .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?disciplineLabel) , 'ski'))
}
